heading: Forfeiture of taxpaid distilled spirits remaining on bonded premises
label: 5612 Forfeiture of taxpaid distilled spirits remaining on bonded premises
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5612, , , related to penalty for using material or removing spirits without supervision, prior to the general revision of this chapter by . See .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 685Pub. L. 85–859section 5687 of this titleProvisions similar to those comprising subsec. (a) of this section were contained in prior section 5625, , , prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 688Pub. L. 85–859

Amendments1979—Subsec. (b). redesignated subpars. (2) and (3) as (1) and (2), respectively, and struck out former subpars. (1) and (4) which excepted distilled spirits which were bottled in bond under and which were returned to bonded premises for rebottling, relabeling, or restamping in accordance with subsec. (d) of section 5233, and excepted such spirits, held on bonded premises, on which the tax had become payable by operation of law, but on which the tax had not been paid.Pub. L. 96–39section 5233 of this title

children.heading: General
children.label: a General
children.text: No distilled spirits on which tax has been paid or determined shall be stored or allowed to remain on the bonded premises of any distilled spirits plant, under the penalty of forfeiture of all spirits so found.
distilled spirits in the process of prompt removal from bonded premises on payment or determination of the tax; or
distilled spirits returned to bonded premises in accordance with the provisions of section 5215.
